title: Add Observability & Monitoring Pipeline
description: Complete route for production-grade observability: error monitoring and crash reporting with Sentry, product analytics and session recording with PostHog, end-to-end health check tests with Playwright, and automated CI enforcement via GitHub Actions.

steps.description: Add Sentry for error monitoring, crash reporting, and performance tracing — captures unhandled exceptions in both server and client components
Add PostHog for product analytics, session recording, and feature flags — understand how users interact with the app and spot UX issues before they become errors
Add Playwright end-to-end tests as health checks for critical user paths — catches regressions that unit tests miss
Configure CI to run Playwright health checks on every push and surface failures as GitHub Checks — so broken paths are caught before they reach production
